# Bullseye Medical Intelligence

> A physician targeting research service for specialty medtech sales teams. Bullseye researches, scores, and prioritizes medical practices from public signals, then delivers a ranked shortlist — with a per-account sales angle and source evidence — so reps know who to call, and why, before the first dial.

Bullseye is not a dialer, a database, or an outreach tool. It is a research service that reduces the "targeting tax": the selling time reps lose to researching, filtering, and guessing which accounts deserve a call. Every score is built from triangulated public sources (practice websites, CMS utilization data, patient directories, review platforms) and shows the evidence behind it — no black-box scoring, no private or purchased data.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.bullseyemedical.ai/): What Bullseye is — research, scoring, and prioritization of physician practices for specialty medtech reps.
- [Pricing & Packages](https://www.bullseyemedical.ai/pricing/): Pricing ladders off the labor cost of pre-call research. Three free scored targets to start; monthly activation retainers begin at $5,000, no long-term lock-in.
- [Data Sources](https://www.bullseyemedical.ai/data-sourcing/): What public signals Bullseye uses, what it deliberately does not use, and how a public footprint becomes a sales-ready brief.
- [The Targeting Tax](https://www.bullseyemedical.ai/targeting-tax/): The hidden cost of poor targeting — where reps lose selling time and what it costs.

## Intelligence (articles)
- [Fit vs. Readiness in Physician Targeting](https://www.bullseyemedical.ai/intelligence/readiness-vs-fit.html): Fit gets you a meeting; readiness — whether a practice is structured to buy fast — predicts the close. How to read a target list differently.
- [Intelligence index](https://www.bullseyemedical.ai/intelligence/): Field notes on physician targeting, account prioritization, and specialty medtech commercial strategy.

## About the offer
- Audience: commercial and sales teams at specialty medical device / medtech companies.
- Method: triangulated public evidence, transparent scoring, per-account sales angle, CRM-ready records.
- Starting point: a free Bullseye Brief of 3 scored targets (proof of methodology).

## Optional
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.bullseyemedical.ai/privacy/): What information is collected and the private data Bullseye never uses.
